summary: The diff only shows a metadata update to project_state.json with no actual implementation of the logo replacement requirement. The BuildRequest requires replacing brand-logo.dim_200x60.png with a user-uploaded logo, but no file changes related to the logo image or its usage are present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the existing brand-logo.dim_200x60.png with the user-uploaded two-line logo image, preserving its exact appearance without any automated resizing, compression, or color modification
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of logo file replacement or any changes to frontend/public/assets/generated/brand-logo.dim_200x60.png. No modifications to components that would display or reference the new logo.
